about.title: Education Revolution
about.subtitle: At CourseMaster, we believe education shouldn't just be consumed - it should be experienced. The tools we build empower the next generation of digital pioneers.
about.mission_desc: To be the world's most accessible high-fidelity education system, regardless of geographical or financial barriers
about.values_subtitle: We implement these principles in every line of code and every lesson we create.
about.value1_desc: We don't settle for average. Our content is verified by industry experts.
about.value2_desc: Transparency is our default setting. We tell the truth about what you can achieve.
about.value3_desc: You're not just a student; you're part of a global collective of creators.
about.value4_desc: We care deeply about human potential and the impact of quality education.

how_it_works.title: How it Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Everything you need to build a professional online academy, without touching a line of code.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Upload your videos, documents, and quizzes. Our intuitive builder helps you structure your curriculum in minutes.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Choose between one-time purchase, subscription, or tiered access. You have full control over your revenue.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Launch your academy with your own branding. Reach students across 190+ countries instantly.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Use advanced analytics to track student progress, engagement, and sales. Optimize for maximum growth.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the platform and your learning journey
faq.q1: How do I get started on CourseMaster?
faq.a1: Sign up for an account, explore our course library, and enroll in any course that interests you. You can start learning instantly.
faq.q2: Are the courses self-paced or live?
faq.a2: We offer both. Most courses are self-paced so you can learn at your own speed, along with live sessions and workshops led by industry experts.
faq.q3: Will I get a certificate after completing a course?
faq.a3: Yes, you will receive a digital certificate after successfully completing a course. You can share it on LinkedIn or with potential employers.
faq.q4: Can I become an instructor on CourseMaster?
faq.a4: Yes, you can. If you have expertise in a subject, you can apply to be an instructor from your dashboard and start teaching.
faq.a5: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on most courses. If you're not satisfied, you can request a refund within 30 days of purchase.
